title: Section 67
content: The owner of any warehoused goods may, with the permission of the proper officer, remove them from one warehouse to another, 1*** subject to such conditions as may be prescribed for the due arrival of the warehoused goods at the warehouse to which removal is permitted.
footnote: 1. The words "without payment of duty" omitted by Act 55 of 1991, s. 5 (we.f. 23-12-1991).
